title: fts_optimize_thread missing in performance_schema.threads
description:
The `fts_optimize_thread` should be in the performance_schema.threads table.
How to repeat:
select thread_id,name,thread_os_id from performance_schema.threads;
Suggested fix:
A `pfs_register_thread()` call is missing in `fts_optimize_thread()`.

Here is the fix:
https://github.com/mysql/mysql-server/pull/349
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_threads (thread_id UInt32, name String, thread_os_id Nullable(UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_threads (thread_id, name, thread_os_id) VALUES (1, 'main_thread', 1001);
INSERT INTO test_threads (thread_id, name) VALUES (2, 'worker_thread', NULL);
SELECT thread_id, name, ifNull(thread_os_id, 'N/A') AS thread_os_id FROM test_threads WHERE thread_id < 3;
SELECT count() FROM test_threads WHERE thread_os_id IS NULL;
